== Notes for [[Item:Q115242|Q115242]] ==

Linhagens Medievais Portuguesas - 3 vols - vol. 2 - pg. 26

Nobiliario das Familias de Portugal - vol. I - pg. 299 ((Alcoforados))

Nobiliario das Familias de Portugal - vol. I - pg. 525 ((Avelares))

Nobiliario das Familias de Portugal - vol. II - pg. 385 ((Bastos))

Nobiliario das Familias de Portugal - vol. V - pg. 93 ((Fafes))

''in'' https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/sources/93LJ-XX4

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
